mapper.sql: e.id, e.category_id, e.title, e.content, e.summary, e.status, e.version, e.source_id, e.author_id, e.published_at, e.expired_at, e.view_count, e.hit_count, e.remark, e.created_at, e.updated_at, e.is_deleted
c.name AS category_name, u.real_name AS author_name, s.file_name AS source_file_name
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM yx_knowledge_entry e LEFT JOIN yx_knowledge_category c ON e.category_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON e.author_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_knowledge_source s ON e.source_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_knowledge_entry SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, source_id = #{sourceId}, expired_at = #{expiredAt}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_knowledge_entry SET status = #{status}, version = #{version}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_knowledge_entry SET status = #{status}, version = #{version}, published_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_knowledge_entry SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
